title: Flarum
description: Flarum is a simple, fast, free and open-source forum software for building modern community discussion platforms.
installation: Uses the community-maintained mondedie/flarum image (the official flarum/flarum repo ships source, not a runnable image). On first boot the container runs the installer non-interactively from the env vars below against the MariaDB add-on, creating the admin account from FLARUM_ADMIN_USER / FLARUM_ADMIN_PASS (min 8 chars) / FLARUM_ADMIN_MAIL. ROTATE the admin password, the mariadb add-on credentials (db/user/password all default to 'flarum'), and log in to change them after setup. FORUM_URL is wired to the live app URL via {{KUBERO_APP_URL}}. Persistent data (installed extensions, compiled public assets, logs) lives under /flarum/app and is kept by the flarum-data volume; for production raise the PHP memory limit and pod size if you install many extensions.
